# Enum Types
enum:Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageRole = ClassicStorageAccountContributor | ClassicStorageAccountKeyOperatorServiceRole | StorageAccountBackupContributor | StorageAccountContributor | StorageAccountKeyOperatorServiceRole | StorageBlobDataContributor | StorageBlobDataOwner | StorageBlobDataReader | StorageBlobDelegator | StorageFileDataPrivilegedContributor | StorageFileDataPrivilegedReader | StorageFileDataSmbShareContributor | StorageFileDataSmbShareReader | StorageFileDataSmbShareElevatedContributor | StorageQueueDataContributor | StorageQueueDataReader | StorageQueueDataMessageSender | StorageQueueDataMessageProcessor | StorageTableDataContributor | StorageTableDataReader

# Capabilities
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/addAzureStorage(name: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/addBlobContainer(name: string, blobContainerName?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureBlobStorageContainerResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/addBlobs(name: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureBlobStorageResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/addDataLake(name: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureDataLakeStorageResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/addDataLakeFileSystem(name: string, dataLakeFileSystemName?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureDataLakeStorageFileSystemResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/addQueue(name: string, queueName?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureQueueStorageQueueResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/addQueues(name: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureQueueStorageResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/addTables(name: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureTableStorageResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/runAsEmulator(configureContainer?: callback) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/withApiVersionCheck(enable?: boolean) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageEmulatorResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/withBlobPort(port: number) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageEmulatorResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/withDataBindMount(path?: string, isReadOnly?: boolean) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageEmulatorResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/withDataVolume(name?: string, isReadOnly?: boolean) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageEmulatorResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/withQueuePort(port: number) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageEmulatorResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/withStorageRoleAssignments(target: Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource, roles: enum:Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageRole[]) -> Aspire.Hosting/Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/withTablePort(port: number) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Storage/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageEmulatorResource
